title: Understory disturbance event
description: One labeled forest disturbance event (or verified false alarm), expressed as the `properties` of a GeoJSON Feature. Schema version 0.1.0.

date_window.description: The window in which the disturbance is known to have occurred

status.description: See CONTRIBUTING.md for the evidence standard behind 'confirmed' and 'rejected'

evidence_source.description: Citation or description of the evidence, e.g. 'Imazon SAD 2026-03 bulletin' or 'field visit 2026-04-12'

optical_alert_date.description: Date the same event first appeared in an optical alert system (GLAD/RADD/DETER), when known — enables the detection-lead-over-optical metric

location_precision.description: 'coarsened' when the geometry was deliberately degraded to protect a sensitive location
